'''daloko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oenologue|oenologue]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-l-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oenologue|oenologue]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| daloko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæleketh|dæleketh]] || [[word:dælekej|dælekej]] || [[word:dælekesh|dælekesh]] || [[word:dæleke|dæleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dalolokoth|dalolokoth]] || [[word:dalolokoj|dalolokoj]] || [[word:dalolokosh|dalolokosh]] || [[word:daloloko|daloloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dalokoth|dalokoth]] || [[word:dalokoj|dalokoj]] || [[word:dalokosh|dalokosh]] || [[word:daloko|daloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dalofkoth|dalofkoth]] || [[word:dalofkoj|dalofkoj]] || [[word:dalofkosh|dalofkosh]] || [[word:dalofkof|dalofkof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dalokotho|dalokotho]] || [[word:dalokojo|dalokojo]] || [[word:dalokosho|dalokosho]] || [[word:dalokoko|dalokoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dalokoth|dalokoth]] || [[word:dalokoj|dalokoj]] || [[word:dalokosh|dalokosh]] || [[word:daloko|daloko]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dalokothol|dalokothol]] || [[word:dalokojol|dalokojol]] || [[word:dalokoshol|dalokoshol]] || [[word:dalokokol|dalokokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dalokothotho|dalokothotho]] || [[word:dalokojojo|dalokojojo]] || [[word:dalokoshosho|dalokoshosho]] || [[word:dalokoko|dalokoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dalokothon|dalokothon]] || [[word:dalokojon|dalokojon]] || [[word:dalokoshon|dalokoshon]] || [[word:dalokokon|dalokokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dalokothoro|dalokothoro]] || [[word:dalokojoro|dalokojoro]] || [[word:dalokoshoro|dalokoshoro]] || [[word:dalokokoro|dalokokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
